text:
Prior Weather Channel, forecaster weather observer United States Force where specialized severe tropical weather.
Cunningham been named Airman Year, first woman promoted Severe Weather section Global Weather Central Offutt Force Base.
While building career motivational public speaking, also communication coach Speechworks, Inc, co-host Storm Front Freaks free lance meteorologist.
Over those years faced many challenges, both personal professional when people hear stories they amazed inspired.
Taking road seemed like natural next chapter career.
wants share experiences help others.
survived cancer twice divorce, three boys step son.
born raised Cincinnati, Ohio, around became obsessed with tornadoes after watching Wizard
first actual tornado when knew then wanted meteorologist.
been featured newspapers magazines asked speak schools events including UPS's Women Leadership Development Team meeting, Long Island Emergency Management conference, Weather Channel's WOWnet (women weather network), Down Syndrome Awareness Gigi House fundraiser Atlanta, National Science Center during Women's History Month Augusta, DeVry's HerWorld Conference STEM Atlanta.
been active community over years, including work Special Olympics, Meals Wheels, homeless shelter.
also volunteer sons' high school Future Shop Marching Band, long time PTSA Exceptional Children board member.
Cunningham Atmospheric Science from Creighton University, Nebraska, Associates Applied Science Weather Technology from Community College Force, over 1500 hours Force weather schools, over hours leadership supervisory training.
Besides passion weather, loves garden, walk, travel, ride Harleys watch football with husband Marty (though it's house divided, Bengals Falcons)... loves music, especially rock Marty always looking more vinyl their collection.
Some obsessed with decorating Halloween Christmas recently found love making holiday wreaths looking sell some work someday.

unique very English novel composed cycle beautiful mysterious fantasy folk tales which combine tell unforgettable storyNOMINATED CILIP CARNEGIE MEDAL'A rich, primordial dreamtime... wonderful excavation story traditions that ancestors huddled around warmth... highly recommended'Alan Moore, author WatchmenThis book like other: magical tapestry folk tales, woven together build world that strange familiar half-remembered dream.
world, world enchanted corn dollies wild dances poppy fields, world tricksters, lovers fools.Through this world, Greychild must journey search mother: from village Brunt Boggart, down treacherous Pedlar Man's track, distant Arleccra, city treasures temptation.
follow him, part will never come back.David Greygoose born near Northampton lives edge Liverpool.
1976 co-founded Windows Project which runs writing workshops schools community venues.
published three collections poetry under name Dave Ward, stories poems have appeared over anthologies well being broadcast radio.
Brunt Boggart first novel nominated CILIP Carnegie Medal.
